label: 🏛️ Council
body: Convene the council (council-v2-spec) on this change before committing.

label: 💡 Brainstorm
body: Use the brainstorming skill first — explore intent and design before any code.

label: 🐛 Debug
body: Use systematic-debugging: form a hypothesis and find root cause before proposing a fix.

label: 📐 Plan only
body: Produce a written plan only. Do not edit code until I approve it.

label: ✅ Verify
body: Run the verification commands and show the output before claiming this works.

label: 🦙 Local offload
body: Offload bulk reads/summaries to the local Ollama tools where it saves main-context tokens.
